question.text: Trading in commodity derivatives on Indian exchanges is done through:

answer.text: Electronic trading platforms providing anonymous order matching
Open outcry system in physical trading pits
Telephone-based negotiation between buyers and sellers

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Indian commodity exchanges use electronic trading platforms (SBTS) where orders are matched anonymously based on price-time priority. **The Trap:** Open outcry was the old system. Telephone trading is OTC. Bilateral agreements are forwards, not exchange-traded futures. **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII covers electronic trading. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Electronic trading ensures transparency, equal access, and fair price discovery — all participants see the same order book and get the same matching rules.
